compiled_state.title: Replace FAKE_TK stubs with v3 ticket command stubs in script tests
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Replace FAKE_TK/TK_CALLS_FILE variable stubs with v3 'ticket' command mocks in script tests. Affected files:

1. tests/scripts/test-lock-acquire-ticket-format.sh:
   - Replace FAKE_TK/FAKE_GIT/TK_CALLS_FILE with a mock 'ticket' command at $MOCK_BIN/ticket
   - The mock logs calls to TICKET_CALLS_FILE (replacing TK_CALLS_FILE)
   - Update assertions that grep TK_CALLS_FILE to grep TICKET_CALLS_FILE
   - Replace TK='...' env var invocations with TICKET='...' or PATH='$MOCK_BIN:$PATH'

2. tests/scripts/test-end-session-error-sweep.sh:
   - Replace mock tk binary at mock_bin/tk with a mock 'ticket' binary
   - The mock logs to TK_LOG_FILE (variable can be renamed TICKET_LOG_FILE)
   - Update bash -c invocation to use ticket instead of tk
   - Update grep assertions on log file

## TDD Requirement
T1 (10f6-325d) must be complete first (RED guard written). After T2, run test-v2-clean-guard.sh to confirm test_no_fake_tk_stubs_in_test_files passes GREEN.

## Files to edit
- tests/scripts/test-lock-acquire-ticket-format.sh
- tests/scripts/test-end-session-error-sweep.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] test-lock-acquire-ticket-format.sh contains no FAKE_TK or TK_CALLS_FILE
  Verify: ! grep -q 'FAKE_TK\|TK_CALLS_FILE' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-lock-acquire-ticket-format.sh
- [ ] test-end-session-error-sweep.sh contains no TK_LOG_FILE variable
  Verify: ! grep -q 'TK_LOG_FILE' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-end-session-error-sweep.sh
- [ ] test_no_fake_tk_stubs_in_test_files guard passes GREEN
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-v2-clean-guard.sh 2>&1 | grep -c PASS | awk '{exit ($1 < 1)}'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
